Case Study • Various

How we helped TIG Dahab Masr: North Africa’s First Gold &#038; Silver Trader Achieves RJC COP 2019 with Growlity

The Challenge

Detailed inside.

Our Solution

Detailed inside.

The Results

Detailed inside.

Growlity Inc., a global consulting firm specializing in ESG, sustainability, and responsible business practices, is proud to announce its successful partnership with TIG Dahab Masr, a leading gold trading company based in Cairo, Egypt, in achieving Responsible Jewellery Council (RJC) Code of Practices (COP) 2019 Certification. This milestone not only validates TIG Dahab Masr’ commitment to responsible sourcing and ethical business conduct but also positions the company on a progressive path toward ESG (Environmental, Social, and Governance) alignment and sustainability integration.

The Responsible Jewellery Council (RJC) is the world’s leading standards-setting organization for the global jewelry and watch industry. Its Code of Practices (COP) 2019 provides a framework for companies to demonstrate their commitment to responsible business practices, covering areas such as human rights, labor rights, environmental stewardship, product integrity, and responsible sourcing of gold, diamonds, and other precious materials. Achieving RJC certification is a globally recognized benchmark for ethical, transparent, and sustainable business operations.

Dr. Nitin Dumasia, President of Growlity Inc., shared his thoughts on this achievement:

“At Growlity, we believe in empowering companies to go beyond compliance and embrace sustainability as a core value. Working with TIG Dahab Masr has been an inspiring journey. Together, we developed robust systems for traceability, due diligence, and ethical sourcing that meet RJC COP 2019 requirements. More importantly, we helped align their operations toward long-term ESG goals, ensuring that they are not only compliant today but resilient and competitive in the future.”

Dr. Fady Kamel, Co-founder and CEO of TIG Dahab Masr, added:

“Achieving the RJC COP 2019 Certification is a proud moment for TIG Dahab Masr and a reflection of our commitment to responsible and ethical gold trading. The guidance from Growlity was instrumental in helping us implement international best practices in due diligence, transparency, and sustainability. This certification reinforces our position as a trusted partner in the global precious metals market, and we are excited to continue building on this momentum by advancing our ESG and sustainability journey.”

About TIG Dahab Masr

Dahab Masr – the first central gold marketplace in Egypt and the Middle East – was established at the end of 2021 as a company specializing in the trade and marketing of gold and silver bullion. Since its launch, the company has relied on fintech to provide safe and flexible digital investment solutions while adhering to both local and international compliance standards.

About Growlity

Growlity Inc. is an international consulting and advisory firm specializing in ESG, sustainability, responsible sourcing, certifications, and management systems. With a mission to help companies grow responsibly, Growlity works across industries including jewelry, manufacturing, technology, and real estate. Under the leadership of Dr. Nitin Dumasia, Growlity has guided numerous organizations globally in achieving certifications, enhancing compliance, and embedding sustainability into their corporate DNA.For companies looking to achieve RJC certification successfully and align with global ESG and sustainability standards, please reach out to Growlity Inc. at contact@growlity.com.
